arts.ttl: I never wanted to leave Chelsea - I was forced to leave before Villa saved me
arts.sum: Over the summer, Maatsen expressed his eagerness for the challenge at Villa: "It’s a challenge for me to come here and show people that I’m capable of doing those things on the highest level," he said. Ian Maatsen is set to face his former club Chelsea for the first time since his summer move, as he gears up to visit Stamford Bridge with Aston Villa on Sunday in the Premier League (1:30pm kick-off).

arts.ttl: Why don’t Chelsea have a sponsor on the front of their jersey?
arts.sum: Following the expiry of a front-of-shirt sponsorship deal worth £120 million ($152m) with telecommunications firm Three, who sponsored Chelsea’s jerseys from 2020 to 2023, The Blues have yet to formally agree a new long-term sponsor. Previously, Chelsea had come to an agreement with streaming platform Paramount+ for sponsorship of their kit of the 2023/24 season, which was ultimately blocked by a Premier League ruling .

arts.sum: Chelsea are back in Premier League action this afternoon with Aston Villa as the visitors to Stamford Bridge . Yes, Sky Sports will be broadcasting Chelsea's Premier League clash against Aston Villa on Sunday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Aston Villa LIVE match updates and team news from Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: But Emery's side have lost all three competitive away matches in November, having won five and drawn one of their opening six fixtures on the road this season. Opponents Chelsea were winless in all eight league matches last season against the teams that finished in the top four - and they've only taken one point from three meetings with those sides in 2024-25.

arts.sum: He's been linked with a move away from the club.

arts.ttl: ‘Lack of class’ – Aston Villa star ‘made fun of’ Juventus player after Champions League game, Italian press not happy
arts.sum: Aston Villa were held to a goalless draw by Juventus in the Champions League earlier this week. It was a frustrating result for Aston Villa, who have been on a poor run of form and came up against a Juve side which was quite depleted due to injuries.
